title: COLLEGE MOVE IN DAY | Freshman year | Coppin State University 💙💛
body: Ayeee Coppin!!! I graduated in 2017! 💙💛💙💛 Words of advice. College is what you make it. Get active on campus, get to know people. Visit other schools!!  Homecoming is next month go to all the events!! I personally will be at the suites :) Be Scholarly and HAVE FUNNNNNNN!!!!
author: @teejaxk5481

title: COLLEGE MOVE IN DAY | Freshman year | Coppin State University 💙💛
body: i got accepted here! thank u for this beautiful vlog, it gives me a lot of insight to this place! it definitly looks fun
author: @sogochii

title: COLLEGE MOVE IN DAY | Freshman year | Coppin State University 💙💛
body:
hey, I’m looking at coppin rn and your videos have definitely encouraged and i think im going to accept my admission offer but i have a couple questions if you don’t mind!
1. what is the safety like there? my parents are worried about the crime rates on and off campus
2. how good are the academics?
3. are the teachers nice?
4. are the dorms clean/comfy?
thank you! love watching your videos, you make college life look so fun and exciting!
author: @potatos_for_lunch

title: COLLEGE MOVE IN DAY | Freshman year | Coppin State University 💙💛
body: I remember when I moved in my dorm college was real fun 💕 I hope you enjoying college and stay focused luv 🦋 32:53

title: HUGE college dorm room haul | college dairies 001 | Coppin State University
body: I use tampons and pads, honestly I prefer tampons over anything trust me when you learn how to us them it's literally a life changer!! like when I buy them I use them during the day pads at night cause I don't trust myself to wake up exactly 8 hours.
